LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Action_Boy.degreeDatas.0.descr: {PAWN_nameDef} recovers stamina and energy quickly, allowing for more actions in a day.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Action_Boy.degreeDatas.0.label: Action Boy/Girl
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Animal_Friend.degreeDatas.0.de: {PAWN_nameDef} is naturally good with animals and less likely to be attacked by them.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Bloody_Mess.degreeDatas.0.desc: {PAWN_nameDef} causes more violent deaths and destruction in combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Commando.degreeDatas.0.descrip: {PAWN_nameDef} is skilled with automatic weapons, firing more accurately and faster.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Commando.degreeDatas.0.label: Commando
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Fortune_Finder.degreeDatas.0.d: {PAWN_nameDef} always seems to find more silver and valuables.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Gunslinger.degreeDatas.0.descr: {PAWN_nameDef} is deadly with pistols and one-handed firearms.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Gunslinger.degreeDatas.0.label: Gunslinger
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Heavy_Handed.degreeDatas.0.des: {PAWN_nameDef} hits harder in melee combat, but is less precise.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Iron_Fist.degreeDatas.0.descri: {PAWN_nameDef} is skilled in unarmed combat, dealing more damage with fists.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Iron_Fist.degreeDatas.0.label: Iron Fist
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Lead_Belly.degreeDatas.0.label: Lead Belly
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Night_Person.degreeDatas.0.des: {PAWN_nameDef} is more alert and productive at night.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Power_Armor_Trained.degreeData: {PAWN_nameDef} has completed basic power armor training. {PAWN_pronoun} is ready to take on the wasteland in any suit of power armor they see fit.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Quick_Draw.degreeDatas.0.descr: {PAWN_nameDef} draws and aims weapons faster than most.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Quick_Draw.degreeDatas.0.label: Quick Draw
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Scrounger.degreeDatas.0.descri: {PAWN_nameDef} finds more resources when foraging or salvaging.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Scrounger.degreeDatas.0.label: Scrounger
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Sharpshooter.degreeDatas.0.des: {PAWN_nameDef} is a master of ranged weapons, rarely missing a shot.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Solar_Powered.degreeDatas.0.de: {PAWN_nameDef} is energized by sunlight, recovering faster during the day.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Tough.degreeDatas.0.descriptio: {PAWN_nameDef} is exceptionally tough, taking less damage from all sources.
LanguageData.FCP_Trait_Tough.degreeDatas.0.label: Tough
